title: Parameter Estimation for Time Series Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of estimating parameters, evaluating model fit, and refining a time series model.
relationships: Process begins with Raw Time Series Data which informs Model Selection. An Initial Parameter Guess is fed into an Estimation Algorithm to create a Fitted Model. The Fitted Model undergoes Diagnostic Checks; if checks fail, the process loops back to refine the Initial Parameter Guess or Model Selection. If checks pass, the final model with its estimated parameters is accepted.
